findings.claim: Subject is the founder/principal of Generic Service, a Phoenix-AZ stability-focused infrastructure consulting firm.
sources: local git author identity in this repo

findings.claim: Subject's GitHub handle is Baphomet480; profile publicly displays the real name 'Matthias Goodman'.
Subject uses two parallel emails with the same local-part: matthiasgoodman@icloud.com (account) and matthiasgoodman@gmail.com (git commits).
Generic Service publishes productized service tiers with prices ($2,000-$2,500), targeting hybrid vSphere+Azure environments in healthcare, manufacturing, and professional services.
Public GitHub footprint (7 repos) is dominated by MSP tooling (NinjaOne, Autotask) and AI-agent infrastructure (claude-skills, multiple MCP servers).
LinkedIn page title for matthias-goodman-3a36961a0 reads 'Senior Cloud Engineer at Candor' — possibly current employment alongside Generic Service, possibly stale headline.
sources: Google search-result snippet for the LinkedIn URL (direct fetch blocked by LinkedIn 999)

findings.claim: Skill 'hugo-sveltia-cms' attributed to Baphomet480/claude-skills is currently indexed on skills.rest but is no longer present in the local repo's skills/ directory.
Neither matthiasgoodman@icloud.com nor matthiasgoodman@gmail.com appears in any web-indexed content.
sources: targeted Google search for both addresses returned no hits

findings.claim: No public Twitter/X, Mastodon, blog, podcast appearance, or trade-press mention found under the name 'Matthias Goodman' or the brand 'Generic Service'.
WHOIS on genericservice.app is privacy-protected (default for .app TLD via Google). No registrant info exposed.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: The 'Baphomet480' handle predates the Generic Service brand and was reused for technical accounts; not chosen for the consulting context.
hypotheses_not_facts.reason: Tone and numeric suffix inconsistent with brand voice.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: Generic Service is a solo or near-solo practice.
hypotheses_not_facts.reason: No other named principals; one-person GitHub footprint; LinkedIn shows ~78 connections.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: Active working relationship with at least one MSP using NinjaOne or Autotask — possibly Candor, possibly the 'existing IT provider' GS partners with.

opsec_recommendations.issue: Pseudonymous GitHub handle is linked to real name in 1 click via profile field + commit author email.
action_options: If pseudonym is intentional: separate git identity, remove name from GitHub profile.
If pseudonym is vestigial: rename GitHub account to MatthiasGoodman or genericservice for brand coherence.

opsec_recommendations.issue: LinkedIn headline 'Senior Cloud Engineer at Candor' may confuse prospects clicking from genericservice.app.
action_options: Update LinkedIn headline to lead with 'Founder, Generic Service' (with or without Candor as secondary).
Or move Candor to past-position if no longer current.

opsec_recommendations.issue: Stale skill ('hugo-sveltia-cms') indexed on skills.rest after removal from repo.
action_options: Periodic sweep comparing dist/ against external indexers.
Add a 'deprecated' field convention to skill manifests.

opsec_recommendations.issue: Email local-part 'matthiasgoodman' is identical across icloud and gmail providers.
action_options: Catch-all forwarder on a personal domain.

opsec_recommendations.issue: Baphomet480/claude-skills is public with 0 stars/forks — discoverability vs. privacy goal is unclear.
action_options: If discoverability: add README, topic tags, license.
If privacy: make repo private and rely on dist/ artifacts only.
